finding: A task that remains only `planned` with no live claim or Broker registry intent can still remain queue head, blocking a valid waiter indefinitely.
expectedBehavior: Queue cleanup/status must identify entries without a live task claim or active Broker intent as stale and provide a governed release/re-arbitration action; planned tasks must never retain write ownership.
evidenceOrRepro: `TASK-AAO-0158` was `planned`, had no claim and no active registry intent, but headed both backlog/map queues ahead of `TASK-TEAM-0079`. `broker release --task TASK-AAO-0158` advanced 0079 to queue head.
followUp: Add stale queue owner detection and regression; status should name the stale task and a copyable cleanup action without silently discarding active ownership.
